# verifyEmail

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the verifyEmail mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk verify-email --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.emailId <UUID> --input.token <String>
```
